name: R5ProductShelfLifeElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 ProductShelfLife to FHIR R4 ProductShelfLife
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 ProductShelfLife to FHIR R4.
